content:
Previously, when an awakener deals damage via poison or poison triggers, it was reflected in the damage breakdown screen at the end of the stage.

This no longer seems to be the case. You can see that I have over 20k poison in this clear but none of this damage is shown in the statistics screen.

Please fix this so i can continue spreading propaganda about why poison units are powerful <:Doll_Wait:1468259092459032606>
Poison no longer shown in damage statistics
